case_title: WEI OUYANG VS. THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN STONE, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HOWEVER THE COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER KWEI HWA SHING IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WEI OUYANG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN STONE PROPERTY MANAGER, JOHN STEWART COMPANY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $792.39 TO THE PLAINTIFF; A CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $742.39 WAS TENDERED IN COURT AND THE BALANCE OF $50 WILL BE MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-29TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,227.17 FILED BY OUYANG, WEI AS TO DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-30-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WEI OUYANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND, REPRESENTED BY DAN STONE, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. ADDRESS INFORMATION ON WHERE TO SERVE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE DAN STONE.MANDARIN INTERPERTER IS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS NOTIFED OF THE NEW HEARING DATE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND TO PROVIDE CANTONESE INTERPERTER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED SEP-13-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND
